dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows perfect adherence to the governance framework. All four reasoning spans successfully passed schema validation, starting with a robust rule loading phase and concluding with validated intent generation.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Deep causal mapping is evident in the 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span, which utilized over 52k tokens to translate work into architectural evolution. This represents a high degree of granularity, though slightly reduced in volume compared to the baseline.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Trade-off analysis within the alignment engine remains stable and consistent with historical performance. Token processing volumes for both alignment and intent generation indicate a thorough evaluation of architectural constraints.
